seasons.name: Summer Night Sports
seasons.theme: Turn evening sports spaces into recurring neighbor rituals.

milestones.label: Return for a second sports night

reward.name: Sports Night Priority Pass
reward.description: Early access to the next resident-organized sports session.

seasons.operator_goal: Increase evening sports-space activation and repeat participation.

seasons.name: Family Discovery Season
seasons.theme: Help families discover places, create together, and form familiar neighbor circles.

milestones.label: Contribute one creation to the story wall

reward.name: Family Workshop Early Access
reward.description: Priority registration for the next limited family workshop.

seasons.operator_goal: Improve family activity return rate and playground participation.

seasons.name: World Keepers Season
seasons.theme: Turn resident observations into visible improvements to shared spaces.

milestones.label: Follow one issue through property response
Vote on the next space micro-upgrade

reward.name: Shared-space Co-creator Vote
reward.description: A vote on the next resident-visible shared-space improvement.

seasons.operator_goal: Increase location-aware issue quality and resident-visible closure.
